# Policy Alpha Research

Policy Alpha Research is an independent macro and equity research platform focused on policy-aware investing, strategic assets, sector rotation, portfolio construction, and risk governance.

## Site

- Website: https://policyalpharesearch.com/
- English homepage: https://policyalpharesearch.com/
- Chinese homepage: https://policyalpharesearch.com/zh.html
- Research notes: https://policyalpharesearch.com/articles.html
- Chinese research notes: https://policyalpharesearch.com/zh-articles.html
- Methodology: https://policyalpharesearch.com/methodology.html

## Core Research Themes

- Policy-driven capital flows
- Critical minerals and strategic materials
- AI infrastructure and autonomous agents
- Energy security and grid resilience
- Healthcare policy and defensive growth
- Portfolio construction and risk governance

## Current Research Notes

- The Next AI Race Won't Be Won by the Smartest Model: https://policyalpharesearch.com/articles/the-next-ai-race-wont-be-won-by-the-smartest-model.html
- 下一场 AI 竞赛，不只属于最聪明的模型: https://policyalpharesearch.com/articles/zh-the-next-ai-race-wont-be-won-by-the-smartest-model.html
- Lithium Is No Longer Just an EV Trade: https://policyalpharesearch.com/articles/lithium-is-no-longer-just-an-ev-trade.html
- 锂不再只是电动车交易: https://policyalpharesearch.com/articles/zh-lithium-is-no-longer-just-an-ev-trade.html

## Important Notice

Policy Alpha Research is for informational and educational purposes only. It does not provide personal financial advice, securities recommendations, fund solicitation, return guarantees, or asset management services.
